type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Nature of the landfilling activities can result in change of plans and the portion of the site used by the vehicle equipment. This can result in changes in road dust emissions. In 2022, an increased number of contractors were present on site due to various activities compared to the previous years; and specifically the querying activities that are ongoing at Hartland Landfill to develop new landfill cells has contributed to the higher particulate matter content on site.
